title: taraxacum selenoides
intro: Taraxacum selenoides, also known as the Selenow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been found to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective properties, providing potential health benefits such as improved liver function, reduced oxidative stress, and enhanced immune system function. Taraxacum selenoides can be prepared into teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
